title: Exceptions should not be created without being raised
description: Avoid creating exceptions that are not raised, as it can lead to unintended behavior or runtime errors.

noncompliant.description: Creating an exception that is not raised

compliant.description: Creating an exception and raising it properly

why_is_this_an_issue: Creating exceptions that are not raised can lead to unintended behavior or runtime errors, making the code harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Remove unused exception declarations or ensure that exceptions are raised properly.

metadata.title: Exceptions should not be created without being raised
